title: ozanthes benzoin
intro: Ozanthes benzoin, also known as sweet benzoin, is a plant-based resin extracted from the bark of the Styrax tonkinensis tree, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of ozanthes benzoin include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of ozanthes benzoin include relieving coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as reducing stress and promoting a good night's sleep. Ozanthes benzoin is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or inhaled to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
